title: RPG Skills
body:
An addon for [Pufferfishes Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills) with a dependancy heavy skill tree. Check the versions tab for dependancies.

Heavily integrates with mods by [ZsoltMolnarrr](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr)

![Skills](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf4e08f6fcb17084a74189e319205b33b0a0ae75.png)
